data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 11
data.detailed_description:
After being attacked by your stalker, you and Kuromisa call the police and inform them of what happened. After explaining the situation, the two of you decide to never leave each other's sight until the situation is handled. On top of that, the two of you go through with your plan to place hidden cameras around your house to try and capture footage of the stalker if she comes snooping around again. The two of you head to the mall to buy supplies, however, you get sidetracked from your original goal when Kuromisa's sadistic, horny, yandere urges start overwhelming her.

Experience the 11th chapter of you and Kuromisa, your 261cm tall, sadistic, yandere, goth girlfriend's love story.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 29 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game
data.about_the_game:
After being attacked by your stalker, you and Kuromisa call the police and inform them of what happened. After explaining the situation, the two of you decide to never leave each other's sight until the situation is handled. On top of that, the two of you go through with your plan to place hidden cameras around your house to try and capture footage of the stalker if she comes snooping around again. The two of you head to the mall to buy supplies, however, you get sidetracked from your original goal when Kuromisa's sadistic, horny, yandere urges start overwhelming her.

Experience the 11th chapter of you and Kuromisa, your 261cm tall, sadistic, yandere, goth girlfriend's love story.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
